location:

Opposite Manyata Tech Park Road
Bengaluru, KA 560045
start_datetime: Apr 22 at 10am to Apr 23 at 6pm GMT+5:30
description:
ICRCET 2026 | Apr 22–23, Bangalore, India. Engineering for a Changing World-uniting researchers and industry to advance sustainable solution

Welcome to the 15th International Conference on Recent Challenges in Engineering and Technology (ICRCET), to be held on April 22–23, 2026, in Bangalore, India. With the theme “Engineering for a Changing World: Creating Sustainable Solutions for the Future,” this conference will bring together researchers, academicians, and industry experts to share knowledge, discuss emerging trends, and explore innovative solutions. ICRCET 2026 aims to inspire collaboration and advance sustainable practices that address the evolving challenges of engineering and technology worldwide.

title: Women in Tech Connect Bengaluru 2026
location:
Bengaluru
Bengaluru
Bengaluru, KA 560001
description:
This event is part of the Women in Tech Global Conference 2026 local series.

As part of the Women in Tech Global Conference 2026, WomenTech Network is hosting its flagship in-person Connect & Career Networking Event in Bengaluru.


This event represents one of the most important moments of the year for our global community, bringing together women in tech, industry leaders, mentors, and companies committed to advancing diversity, equity, and inclusion across the technology sector.

Designed as a central in-person touchpoint of the Global Conference, the networking event provides a high-impact environment for meaningful conversations, strategic connections, and long-term professional relationship-building.

Participants will have the opportunity to engage with peers and decision-makers from across the tech ecosystem, explore career pathways, and connect with organizations shaping the future of technology.

More details about the event will be announced soon. Stay tuned for updates.




Your company is interested in co-hosting this event? Apply here.




BRING DIVERSITY, EQUALITY, AND THE FEELING OF BELONGING TO TECH

Why Join?

Engage professionals and attract talent with personal stories and insights from your engineering leaders
Share about your brand, projects, and technologies, and connect with the local women in tech community
Showcase your company culture and D&I involvement


Important: Due to limited venue capacity, only approved attendees will be allowed to join the event. If you do not receive an email from WomenTech Network with the location and instructions to confirm your attendance, you will not be admitted entry. Make sure to check your inbox for confirmation details!

title: AI Implementation in Business | Hyderabad
location:
Hyderabad
Online Event
Hyderabad, TS 500001
description:
Learn how Artificial Intelligence can transform operations, boost efficiency, and drive growth across industries
Welcome to AI Implementation in Business!

Are you curious about how artificial intelligence can revolutionize your business operations?

In today’s rapidly evolving digital landscape, businesses that harness the power of AI are leading the way in innovation, efficiency, and growth. This workshop is designed to give you the tools and insights to integrate AI into your business strategy, transforming how you operate and make decisions. Whether you’re looking to stay ahead of the competition or explore the full potential of AI, this training will help you take that crucial next step.

Whether you're a small startup or a large corporation, this event is perfect for anyone looking to stay ahead in the digital age. Don't miss out on this opportunity to learn from the best in the field!




Why Learn About AI

In a world where technology is rapidly advancing, understanding AI is crucial for staying competitive and driving innovation. Learning about AI equips you with the knowledge to leverage its capabilities effectively, making you a valuable asset in any organization.

01) Drive Innovation

AI opens doors to new possibilities, enabling you to create innovative solutions and improve existing processes.

02) Enhance Decision-Making

By analyzing data more efficiently, AI provides valuable insights that lead to better, data-driven decisions.

03) Gain a Competitive Edge

Mastering AI technology positions you ahead of the curve, giving you an advantage in a technology-driven market.




What You'll Gain from this Workshop
01) In-Depth Knowledge

Understand the core concepts of AI and its strategic importance in modern business.

02) Hands-On Experience

Acquire practical skills through interactive sessions and real-world AI applications.

03) Strategic Integration

Learn how to effectively integrate AI into your business strategy to drive growth and innovation.

04) Enhanced Decision-Making

Develop the ability to leverage AI for improved data analysis and informed decision-making




Who Should Attend
01) Business Leaders & Managers

Those seeking to understand how AI can optimize operations and drive strategic growth

02) Entrepreneurs & Innovators

Individuals looking to leverage AI for innovative solutions in startups or small businesses

03) Technology Enthusiasts

Individuals eager to explore AI’s potential and its transformative impact across different sectors.

title: 6th Recommerce Expo 2026
location:
The LaLiT Ashok Bangalore
Kumarakrupa Road
Bengaluru, KA 560001
start_datetime: Mar 17 at 8am to Mar 18 at 9pm GMT+5:30
description:
6th Recommerce Expo 2026 brings practical circular economy solutions, industry leaders, and innovation together in Bengaluru.
About GLOBAL LEADERS MEETITAD & WEEE 2025

From the Industrial Age to the AI Age, electronics have been the invisible force behind every revolution. Today, as we step into the Circular Revolution, the focus shifts to rethinking and restoring our relationship with electronic waste.




Global Collaboration Hub

Connects policymakers, sustainability leaders, tech innovators, and recyclers under one roof to tackle e-waste challenges.




Future-Focused Dialogue

Unpacks the next wave of circular economy trends, IT asset disposition (ITAD) strategies, and responsible electronics recovery.




Innovation Meets Action

Showcases real-world solutions, tools, and technologies transforming how we reuse, recycle, and repurpose electronic waste.




Policy & Impact Conversations

Promotes policy-level discussions to support better governance and compliance in the e-waste and ITAD ecosystem.




Growth Partnerships

Serves as a catalyst for strategic collaborations, investment opportunities, and growth in the circular electronics economy.




The “WEEE” Movement

Join the movement to Rethink, React, Redesign, and Restore—reshaping how we treat electronic waste for a better tomorrow.

For more info: https://itad.recommerceeco.com/

location:
Bengaluru
Live Online Workshop
Bengaluru, KA 560066
description:
Learn how robotics transform industries and drive innovation with practical insights and real-world applications.
Welcome to Leveraging Robotics for Success!

Are you ready to leverage robotics for success in your business?

Unlock the transformative potential of robotics by diving into cutting-edge technologies, real-world applications, and the profound impact robotics has across industries. In this workshop, Leveraging Robotics for Success, you'll gain practical insights into how robotics revolutionises workflows, improves efficiency, and drives innovation in both industrial and service sectors.

Participants will explore the fundamentals of robotics, from automation and machine learning integration to the design of autonomous systems. Real-world case studies will demonstrate how businesses have successfully leveraged robotics to enhance productivity, streamline operations, and gain a competitive edge in the market.

Join us to discover how robotics can open new doors for your career or business!




Claim a 5% Discount on this workshop, click here to access!




Why Learn About Robotics

In an era where automation and intelligent systems are becoming essential across industries, understanding robotics is no longer a luxury—it’s a necessity. Robotics knowledge empowers you to stay competitive and foster innovation, equipping you with the skills needed to harness its capabilities for optimizing processes, reducing operational costs, and enhancing productivity.

Learning about robotics positions you at the forefront of technological advancements, making you a valuable asset in any organization. Whether you're aiming to advance your career or drive your business forward, expertise in robotics opens up a world of opportunities in today's increasingly automated landscape.

01) Drive Innovation and Efficiency
Leverage robotics to create groundbreaking solutions, automate complex tasks, and streamline workflows with precision. Robotics enhances both creativity and operational productivity, reducing errors and optimizing business processes.

02) Boost Productivity and Accuracy

India Electronics Week (IEW) is India's only electronics event for the Creators of electronics products.

India Electronics Week (IEW) is India's only electronics event for the Creators of electronics products. It focuses on R&D and New Product Development of electronics. Be it the chip, the PCB, the circuit or the complete embedded systems' solution--IEW has conference tracks to cater to R&D and NPD teams of all.




With a track record of 2,000 to 4,000-plus conference delegates attending its conferences, IEW hosts one of Asia's largest conferences on electronics.

location:
Bengaluru
Live Online Workshop

description:
Learn how AI transforms marketing strategies with innovative automation, personalization, and analytics tools.
Welcome to Harnessing AI for Marketing Innovation!

Are you ready to revolutionize your marketing strategy with the power of AI?

In today’s data-driven world, artificial intelligence is transforming the way businesses approach marketing, enabling personalized customer experiences, automation, and advanced analytics. In this workshop, you'll gain practical insights into how AI can enhance your marketing efforts and drive results.

Participants will explore AI-driven tools for customer targeting, content personalization, and campaign optimization. You’ll learn how businesses are leveraging AI to streamline processes, improve ROI, and stay ahead of the competition in a fast-evolving digital landscape. Whether you’re a marketing professional or a business owner, this workshop provides the knowledge and strategies to successfully implement AI in your marketing efforts.

Join us and discover how AI can take your marketing to the next level!




Claim a 5% Discount on this workshop, click here to access!




Why Learn About AI for Marketing?

Artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming a game-changer for marketers in a rapidly evolving digital landscape. Understanding how to harness AI allows you to personalize customer experiences, automate repetitive tasks, and analyze vast amounts of data to optimize your campaigns for better results. AI-driven marketing enables more precise targeting, greater efficiency, and improved ROI, making it essential for businesses looking to stay competitive.

By learning about AI for marketing, you will:

01) Boost Campaign Effectiveness: Use AI to enhance customer targeting, content personalization, and overall campaign performance.

02) Streamline Marketing Operations: Automate repetitive tasks and free up time for more strategic initiatives.

03) Gain Actionable Insights: Analyze customer behaviour and marketing data in real-time to make data-driven decisions that increase ROI.

With AI transforming marketing strategies across industries, gaining expertise in this area ensures you stay ahead of the curve and maximize your marketing potential.




What You'll Gain from this Workshop

01) AI Tools and Technologies for Marketing
Discover the latest AI-driven tools and platforms that are revolutionizing marketing, including automation, predictive analytics, and machine learning.

02) Personalization and Customer Targeting with AI
Learn how to use AI to create personalized marketing campaigns that enhance customer engagement and boost conversions.

03) Optimizing Marketing Campaigns Using AI
Gain practical insights into how AI can improve campaign performance, streamline processes, and optimize marketing strategies for better ROI.

04) Real-World Case Studies
Explore examples of how leading companies are leveraging AI to transform their marketing efforts, inspiring your own business.

This workshop equips participants with the tools, strategies, and knowledge to start implementing AI into their marketing strategies for increased efficiency and success.




Who Should Attend

01) Marketing Professionals and Strategists
Individuals looking to stay ahead of the curve by integrating AI into their marketing efforts to enhance personalization, automation, and analytics.

02) Business Owners and Entrepreneurs
Professionals seeking to leverage AI to streamline marketing operations, improve customer engagement, and boost ROI for their business.

03) Digital Marketers and Data Analysts
Those interested in learning how AI-driven insights and predictive analytics can optimize their marketing campaigns and improve data-driven decision-making.

This workshop is ideal for anyone eager to explore the power of AI to drive innovation and efficiency in their marketing strategies.

location:
Malaka Spice
North Main Road
#Siddharth Chambers Pune, MH 411001
description:
Pune launch of AnyFeast. Try AI powered meal planning live and simplify what to cook every day.
AnyFeast Pune Launch

AI Powered Meal Planning for Real Life

Join us at Malaka Spice for a small, interactive session where you experience how AI can simplify everyday food decisions.

This is not a lecture. It is a practical, hands on café experience focused on one question: what should I cook today?

The Experience

Live App Walkthrough
Download and explore the AnyFeast app in real time with the team.

Solve Real Meal Challenges
Work through everyday cooking situations using AI powered suggestions.

Founder Conversation
Hear from Pankaj Kale on why AnyFeast was built and how it supports healthier, more practical eating.

Expert Discussion
A focused conversation with a doctor and dietitian on food, training goals, and technology.

Networking
Connect with founders, gym owners, and early adopters.

Who Should Attend

This session is ideal for:

Gym owners and coaches guiding member nutrition
Busy professionals struggling with daily meal decisions
Founders interested in applied AI
Anyone who wants healthier eating without complex diet rules

Important Details

Bring your smartphone.
Seats are intentionally limited to 40 to maintain a focused and interactive experience. Ticket value is fully redeemable inside the AnyFeast app.

Watch a 30 second intro from the founder

AnyFeast AI Scanner

title: 19th edition - India Drilling & Exploration Conference (IDEC) 2026
location:
The Lalit Mumbai
Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport Road
Mumbai, MH 400059
description:
Gateway to Indian Oil & Gas Industry

IDEC serves as a distinguished platform for advancing technological innovation, operational safety, and best practices within the oil, gas, and energy domains. Convened in Mumbai, India’s primary energy hub, the conference facilitates collaboration among industry professionals, subject-matter experts, and regulatory authorities to address emerging challenges and future opportunities in energy development.




As the world’s energy landscape evolves, the focus on production enhancement and energy security becomes increasingly vital. IDEC 2026 aims to address these challenges by showcasing cutting-edge strategies and technological advancements that drive efficient resource development and sustainable growth.




Objectives




- To facilitate knowledge exchange on innovative drilling, exploration, and production technologies

- To promote discussions on strategies for enhancing energy security through optimized resource management

- To foster collaboration among industry players, policymakers, and academia

- To explore sustainable practices and digital solutions in oil and gas operations

- To identify opportunities for investment and technological adoption in the energy sector




Who Should Attend




- Petroleum Engineers and Geoscientists

- Drilling and Exploration Professionals

- Energy Analysts and Market Experts

- Industry Executives and Decision Makers

- Policy Makers and Regulators

- Researchers and Academia in Petroleum Engineering

- Technology Providers and Service Companies




Key Highlights




Technical Presentations & Panel Discussions:.Explore innovative strategies in drilling, exploration, and production enhancement.
Keynote Addresses: Insights from industry pioneers and thought leaders on energy security and technological innovations.
Technology Demonstrations: Showcase of the latest tools, equipment, and digital solutions transforming the energy landscape.
Networking Sessions: Engage with peers, industry experts, and potential partners to foster collaborations and strategic alliances.
Exhibition Area: Explore cutting-edge products, services, and technological solutions from leading industry players.




Join Us - Be part of IDEC 2026 to gain insights, share your expertise, and contribute to shaping the future of energy production. Together, we can drive innovation, ensure energy security, and promote collaboration in the development of the oil and gas industry.




Conference Sessions:




Keynote / Inaugural Session: Energy Security and Policy Frameworks
Advances in Oil & Gas Exploration Technologies
Drilling Engineering & Well Construction
Geomechanics & Reservoir Characterization
Well Logging, Testing & Reservoir Monitoring
Artificial Intelligence & Big Data Analytics in Oil & Gas
Enhanced Oil Recovery Techniques and Technologies
Enhancing Safety and Risk Management in the Industry

We are pleased to invite your organisation for participation for making the event successful. Request you to pls support the 19th edition of IDEC.

title: Women in Tech Pune - OutGeekWomen
location:
Pune
TBA
Pune, MH TBA
description:
All the badass women in tech, are you in? #outgeekwomen #womenintech
We are happy to extend an invitation to our event, offering a chance to network with accomplished, mid- and senior level women pros across diverse IT domains, rub shoulders with CTOs, connect with talented dev teams, and mingle with the brilliant minds behind your favorite tech brands. This event is a match made in heaven for software engineers, data scientists, PMs and project managers, and UI/UX designers who want to stay ahead of the game in the fast-paced world of tech. While this event is centered around women in tech, we extend a warm invitation to everyone to join us.




On the company side, we have CTOs who can write code blindfolded, VP of Engineering who have a black belt in project management, and talent acquisition leaders who have recruited more people than McDonald's has served hamburgers. And on the attendee side, we have techies who know how to turn caffeine into code and can make an app out of thin air. This event is not just about networking, it's about connecting with fellow mid-/senior tech pros in the industry, sharing a laugh or two, and maybe even finding your next career move. So come join us for a unique networking event where job seekers take the driver's seat!

We will: listen to short and sweet pitches by CTOs and hiring teams and vote best pitch (who said that corporate evaluation can't be fun?), talk all things tech, network and run speed interviews, meet faces behind our fav tech brands, and see what our local tech has to offer this season.

Tickets, Fees, Collaboration

Curious mid-career techies and job seekers never pay fees to attend our events unless they secure one of the last 10 tickets available. We offer 190 free tickets, and only the final 10 are paid. If you’re hiring and are looking to present, network and hire at this event, please register here. If you are a part of a tech/community group and are interested in joining forces, please email us at hello@outgeek.org.




Previous hiring/presenting teams came from:

What’s the next step?

Register now and our event director will be in touch a few days prior to the session with event details, agenda, speakers, employer information and jobs.




What if my current employer attends the event?

We will notify you when your employer joins the session.




Are your events virtual?

Some of our events are in-person while others are held virtually via Hopin. Both of them have proven to offer an excellent experience for both job seekers and employers. For details please review the event location on your right.




Disclaimer

An event ticket does not guarantee admission due to the theme restrictions (full-stack, back-end, product-only) and roster of posted vacancies. We work with mid- and senior-level IT talent, and rarely see entry-level positions advertised at our sessions.




Refunds

Our events are free for talented tech enthusiasts seeking new job opportunities.

title: Empowering Modern HR Teams with AI | Delhi
location:
Delhi
Online Event
Delhi, DL 0
description:
How modern HR teams are using AI to hire smarter, uncover people insights, and cut HR admin work.
Welcome to Empowering Modern HR Teams with AI




AI is rapidly reshaping how HR teams hire, engage, and support employees, but knowing where AI adds real value (and where it doesn’t) is critical.

In this practical workshop, we explore how modern HR teams are using AI to improve recruitment decisions, gain meaningful people insights, and reduce the administrative burden of HR operations, without replacing human judgement or compromising trust.

You’ll gain a clear, business-focused understanding of how AI can be applied across core HR functions, including candidate screening and shortlisting, employee performance and engagement insights, and everyday HR operations such as documentation, workflows, and employee queries.

This session focuses on real-world use cases, practical examples, and responsible adoption, helping HR professionals move beyond experimentation and into confident, informed use of AI at work.

Whether you’re part of a People & Culture team, Talent Acquisition function, or HR leadership group, this workshop will help you understand how AI can support better people decisions and more efficient HR operations in today’s workplace.




Claim a 5% Discount on this workshop, click here to access!




Why Learn About AI for HR?

AI is increasingly being introduced into hiring, performance analysis, and HR operations, often faster than HR teams are given the time or guidance to understand it properly.

Learning how AI works in an HR context helps teams make better people decisions, reduce manual administrative workload, and adopt new tools confidently and responsibly. When used well, AI supports HR teams by improving consistency, surfacing insights, and freeing time for higher-value people work, without replacing human judgement.

By learning about AI for HR, you will:

01) Improve Hiring Decisions

Understand how AI supports candidate screening and shortlisting, helping HR teams focus on the right talent faster and more consistently.

02) Gain Meaningful People Insights

Learn how AI can analyse feedback, performance data, and engagement signals to surface patterns and insights that are difficult to identify manually.

03) Reduce HR Operational Overload

Explore how AI can automate routine HR tasks such as documentation, workflows, and employee queries, freeing time for strategic HR work.

As AI becomes embedded across HR systems and processes, understanding where it adds value, and where it should be applied with caution, is essential for modern HR teams.




What You'll Gain from this Workshop

01) A Clear Understanding of AI in HR

Understand how AI is applied across recruitment, people insights, and HR operations without hype or unnecessary complexity.

02) Practical HR Use Cases That Matter

Explore real world AI use cases across hiring, people insights, and HR operations, focused on saving time and decision quality.

03) Real World Case Studies

Review practical examples of how HR teams are using AI today, including outcomes, challenges, and lessons learned.

04) Confidence to Apply AI Responsibly

Build confidence to assess AI tools, ask the right questions, and apply AI responsibly in everyday HR decisions.

This workshop equips HR professionals with the knowledge, clarity, and confidence to engage with AI meaningfully and responsibly in the workplace.




Who Should Attend

01) HR and People and Culture Professionals

HR practitioners looking to understand how AI can support recruitment, people insights, and everyday HR operations practically and responsibly.

02) Talent Acquisition and Recruitment Teams

Professionals involved in hiring who want to explore how AI can assist with candidate screening, shortlisting, and improving the overall recruitment process.

03) HR Leaders and People Managers

HR leaders, managers, and business partners seeking to make better people decisions, reduce administrative workload, and confidently engage with AI in their organisations.

This workshop is ideal for HR professionals who want a clear, practical understanding of how AI can support modern HR teams without replacing human judgement or introducing unnecessary risk.

title: CONVERGENCE 2026 - Bangalore
location:
Vivanta Bengaluru, Whitefield
Whitefield Main Road
Bengaluru, KA 560066
description:
Get ready to explore the future of product and innovation at PLF Convergence 2026 Bengaluru where bold ideas meet real-world impact.

Product Leaders Forum Bengaluru Convergence 2026 is a full-day gathering of product leaders, CXOs, founders, and professionals focused on what’s next in product innovation and leadership.

Happening on 13 March 2026 (Friday) in Bengaluru, this year’s theme is “The Product Frontier: Building What’s Next.”

The Convergence explores how product leaders can navigate rapid change, make confident bets, and build future-ready products and teams.

What’s included:

A CXO Panel on what CEOs, CPOs & CTOs are betting on next
An Industry Panel covering Fintech, SaaS, Consumer & AI
An interactive Ask Me Anything with senior product leaders
A hands-on workshop on designing your frontier product bet
Parallel Tracks on 1:1 Speed Mentoring with top Leaders
Parallel Track on Hiring Event with companies
Networking with likeminded and talented folks around you



Parallel tracks include a Hiring Event (Talentathon), Speed Mentoring, and Hands-on-AI Workshop, offering real career and business opportunities beyond the talks.




Please Note: We have three passes:

'Delegate Pass' which includes access to Full day event including hands-on-workshop

'Growth Pass' which includes access to Full day event including hands-on-workshop + 1:1 Speed Mentoring

'Career Pass' which includes access to Full day event including hands-on-workshop + Hiring Event



This isn’t a conference to sit back and listen.

It’s a convergence designed to move your career, product thinking, and network forward.




The frontier is forming.

The only question is – will you be in the room?

Early Bird passes valid till 19th February, 2026

title: Conceptual Understanding as an Ecosystem: Ideas, Purpose, and Practices
location:
NAAVU SCHOOL
NO 140-P&141 EPIP Zone Whitefield Road
Bengaluru, KA 560066
start_datetime: Mar 23 at 9am to Mar 24 at 3pm GMT+5:30
description:
Join J. Rafael Ángel in a deep dive into how ideas, purpose, and practice interact in our quest for conceptual understanding!

Conceptual Understanding as an Ecosystem: Ideas, Purpose, and Practice

We commonly speak about conceptual understanding within the teaching and learning context. However, thriving in a learning community requires members to construct and share a conceptual understanding related to philosophy, policy and practices.

Conceptual understanding is the living foundation of every thriving learning organisation. In this dynamic professional learning experience, educators and leaders are invited to explore conceptual understanding not as a static idea, but as an ecosystem: a vibrant interplay of shared language, organisational purpose, professional identity, and daily practice.

Schools flourish when their people make sense of learning in coherent, connected ways. Yet, in many contexts, teams struggle to establish shared meaning around what “high-quality learning,” “effective teaching,” or “powerful collaboration” truly look like. This workshop offers a space to slow down, zoom out, and examine the conceptual roots that sustain and/or challenge collective growth.

Through collaborative inquiry, case studies, and facilitated reflection, participants will uncover how ideas, purpose, and practice feed one another, shaping the culture of a school from within. We will examine how conceptual understanding interacts with intellectual capital, commitment, and competence, and what happens when a learning community aligns its language, aspirations, and structures.

By the end of this workshop, participants will:

recognise conceptual understanding as an organisational force that influences alignment, coherence, and transformation;
explore how shared meaning is built, sustained, and enacted across roles and teams;
identify the conceptual dynamics shaping their own school’s learning ecosystem; and
generate guiding questions that open pathways for future growth and collaborative innovation.


This in-person event will be held at NAAVU SCHOOL, providing a vibrant setting for collaboration and inspiration.

Don't miss out on this opportunity to delve into the depths of conceptual understanding!

Below are the sessions that constitute the architecture of this learning experience:

1. Why does Conceptual Understanding Matters within a School Culture?

2. Language as a Mirror: The Role of Words in Shaping Conceptual Understanding.

3. Collaborative Inquiry: Surfacing Culture and Aspiration Questions.

4. The Dance of Understanding: When Conceptual Clarity Meets Commitment, Competence, and Intellectual Capital.

5. Designing for Alignment: Systems and Structures that Support Shared Understanding.

6. From Insight to Intention: Building Commitment and Capacity.

7. Practice and Reflection: Embedding Understanding in Daily Work.

8. Sustaining the Journey: Monitoring Growth and Coherence.




Participants will receive:

A certificate of participation
A toolkit with strategies and protocols for them to put into practice in their own context




For more information, contact Rafael at rafael@ampersandconsulting.com

Thanks to the major success of GIIS event, we are excited to announce that BLS is back with GIIS-IRES New Delhi, India on 11th April 2026.
🌍 21st Global Investment Immigration Summit (GIIS) – Delhi 2026

📍 Delhi, India | 🗓 11th April 2026

Welcome to the official registration page for the 21st edition of the Global Investment Immigration Summit (GIIS), returning to Delhi by popular demand. This exclusive, high-impact event brings together global leaders in investment migration, real estate, wealth management, and international business expansion under one roof.

This is your gateway to second citizenship, global residency, overseas investments, and international business growth.

✅ Who Should Attend?

This summit is a must-attend for:

HNIs & UHNWIs exploring citizenship, residency, and global investment opportunities
Investors & Entrepreneurs planning overseas business expansion
Immigration & Investment Advisors serving global-minded clients
Wealth Managers & Family Offices expanding portfolio offerings
Real Estate Developers & Agents targeting international markets
Legal, Tax & Compliance Professionals
Fund Managers & Sovereignty Advisors
Government & Embassy Representatives
Global Mobility & Immigration Service Providers
🌟 Why Attend GIIS Delhi 2026?

Whether your goal is to:

✅ Migrate to the USA via the EB-5 Immigrant Investor Program
✅ Purchase international real estate and earn rental income while securing residency or citizenship
✅ Expand your business overseas by setting up corporations abroad and holding international assets
✅ Secure a second passport for global mobility, tax optimization, and family security
✅ Receive the best legal and tax structuring advice
✅ Meet and Greet - Country representative of India for the ease and confidence

GIIS Delhi 2026 is your one-stop global investment and migration platform.

🎤 What to Expect
High-level expert presentations
Interactive panel discussions
Live Q&A with industry leaders
Free one-to-one consultations
Power networking with global stakeholders
Exclusive project showcases

👉 The full conference agenda will be released closer to the event date.

💬 Key Topics & Discussions

Get answers directly from global industry experts:

Which country is best for me & my family?
Which immigration or residency program suits my profile?
What are the processing timelines?
How much investment is required?
Can I invest in my own overseas business and get PR or citizenship?
What are the latest global mobility trends?
Industry Updates Will Cover:
Source of Funds regulations
Concurrent Filing
Set-Aside Visas
Retrogression & Processing Times
Latest developments in European Golden Visa Programs
Overseas Business Setup & Expansion Pathways
🌐 About the Organiser – BLS Global

BLS Global are pioneers in organizing world-class platforms that connect investors with emerging and established investment immigration & global business markets. With a proven legacy of successful international summits, GIIS is recognised as one of the most trusted industry platforms worldwide.

🎟 Secure Your Spot Today!
✅ Limited seats available
✅ High-value networking
✅ Direct access to global decision-makers
✅ Free professional consultations

👉 Register now and secure your place at GIIS Delhi 2026!

TESTIMONIAL

PREVIOUS SPONSORS & SPEAKERS

title: Women in Tech Bengaluru - OutGeekWomen
location:
Bengaluru
Tba
Bengaluru, KA tba
description:
All the badass women in tech, are you in? #outgeekwomen #womenintech
We are happy to extend an invitation to our event, offering a chance to network with accomplished, mid- and senior level women pros across diverse IT domains, rub shoulders with CTOs, connect with talented dev teams, and mingle with the brilliant minds behind your favorite tech brands. This event is a match made in heaven for software engineers, data scientists, PMs and project managers, and UI/UX designers who want to stay ahead of the game in the fast-paced world of tech. While this event is centered around women in tech, we extend a warm invitation to everyone to join us.




On the company side, we have CTOs who can write code blindfolded, VP of Engineering who have a black belt in project management, and talent acquisition leaders who have recruited more people than McDonald's has served hamburgers. And on the attendee side, we have techies who know how to turn caffeine into code and can make an app out of thin air. This event is not just about networking, it's about connecting with fellow mid-/senior tech pros in the industry, sharing a laugh or two, and maybe even finding your next career move. So come join us for a unique networking event where job seekers take the driver's seat!

We will: listen to short and sweet pitches by CTOs and hiring teams and vote best pitch (who said that corporate evaluation can't be fun?), talk all things tech, network and run speed interviews, meet faces behind our fav tech brands, and see what our local tech has to offer this season.

Tickets, Fees, Collaboration

Curious mid-career techies and job seekers never pay fees to attend our events unless they secure one of the last 10 tickets available. We offer 190 free tickets, and only the final 10 are paid. If you’re hiring and are looking to present, network and hire at this event, please register here. If you are a part of a tech/community group and are interested in joining forces, please email us at hello@outgeek.org.




Previous hiring/presenting teams came from:

What’s the next step?

Register now and our event director will be in touch a few days prior to the session with event details, agenda, speakers, employer information and jobs.




What if my current employer attends the event?

We will notify you when your employer joins the session.




Are your events virtual?

Some of our events are in-person while others are held virtually via Hopin. Both of them have proven to offer an excellent experience for both job seekers and employers. For details please review the event location on your right.




Disclaimer

An event ticket does not guarantee admission due to the theme restrictions (full-stack, back-end, product-only) and roster of posted vacancies. We work with mid- and senior-level IT talent, and rarely see entry-level positions advertised at our sessions.




Refunds

Our events are free for talented tech enthusiasts seeking new job opportunities.

www.outgeek.org

title: Women in Tech Hyderabad - OutGeekWomen
location:
Hyderabad
TBA
Hyderabad, TS TBA
description:
All the badass women in tech, are you in? #outgeekwomen #womenintech
We are happy to extend an invitation to our event, offering a chance to network with accomplished, mid- and senior level women pros across diverse IT domains, rub shoulders with CTOs, connect with talented dev teams, and mingle with the brilliant minds behind your favorite tech brands. This event is a match made in heaven for software engineers, data scientists, PMs and project managers, and UI/UX designers who want to stay ahead of the game in the fast-paced world of tech. While this event is centered around women in tech, we extend a warm invitation to everyone to join us.




On the company side, we have CTOs who can write code blindfolded, VP of Engineering who have a black belt in project management, and talent acquisition leaders who have recruited more people than McDonald's has served hamburgers. And on the attendee side, we have techies who know how to turn caffeine into code and can make an app out of thin air. This event is not just about networking, it's about connecting with fellow mid-/senior tech pros in the industry, sharing a laugh or two, and maybe even finding your next career move. So come join us for a unique networking event where job seekers take the driver's seat!

We will: listen to short and sweet pitches by CTOs and hiring teams and vote best pitch (who said that corporate evaluation can't be fun?), talk all things tech, network and run speed interviews, meet faces behind our fav tech brands, and see what our local tech has to offer this season.

Tickets, Fees, Collaboration

Curious mid-career techies and job seekers never pay fees to attend our events unless they secure one of the last 10 tickets available. We offer 190 free tickets, and only the final 10 are paid. If you’re hiring and are looking to present, network and hire at this event, please register here. If you are a part of a tech/community group and are interested in joining forces, please email us at hello@outgeek.org.




Previous hiring/presenting teams came from:

What’s the next step?

Register now and our event director will be in touch a few days prior to the session with event details, agenda, speakers, employer information and jobs.




What if my current employer attends the event?

We will notify you when your employer joins the session.




Are your events virtual?

Some of our events are in-person while others are held virtually via Hopin. Both of them have proven to offer an excellent experience for both job seekers and employers. For details please review the event location on your right.




Disclaimer

An event ticket does not guarantee admission due to the theme restrictions (full-stack, back-end, product-only) and roster of posted vacancies. We work with mid- and senior-level IT talent, and rarely see entry-level positions advertised at our sessions.




Refunds

Our events are free for talented tech enthusiasts seeking new job opportunities.

www.outgeek.org

title: Building Your Future Workforce
location:
Taj Lands End, Mumbai
728, Byramji Jeejeebhoy Road
Mumbai, MH 400050
description:
Join us at Taj Lands End Hotel, Mumbai to explore smart strategies for shaping the next-gen workforce and boosting your team’s future!

“Trust, Tech & Talent: Building High‑Performance Cultures in the Age of AI.”




This roundtable event hosted by the University of Bristol will be exploring practical strategies for integrating ethical, effective AI and Data Science Technologies into HR practices while strengthening the cultural resilience organisations need to navigate rapid technological change and workforce transformation. This session is aimed at HR leaders, Talent Aquisition leaders and Business leaders.

Hosted by Uday Virmani (Chief Business Officer, University of Bristol Mumbai Enterprise Campus) the roundtable will be exploring:

AI and Workforce Transformation: HR leaders are under pressure to leverage AI responsibly while maintaining quality, trust and transparency in talent processes.

Cultural Resilience: In an era of hybrid work and automation, building inclusive, high-performance cultures is essential for attracting and retaining top talent.

Future Skills: Organisations need graduates equipped with digital, analytical, and creative capabilities to remain competitive.

Key Takeaways for Attendees

Learn how ethical AI can transform HR and talent acquisition.
Discover strategies for building resilient, high-performance cultures.
Explore collaboration opportunities with the University of Bristol to develop future‑ready talent pipelines that address evolving technical, digital, and professional skills needs.
Gain sector-specific insights on emerging skills and workforce trends.
Identify opportunities for reskilling to take advantage of new AI opportunities.

title: WomenHack - Bangalore - Employer Ticket - April 8, 2026
location:
Event
Bangalore, Karnataka
description:
WomenHack - Bangalore - Employer Ticket - April 6, 2026
WomenHack is a community that aims to create a more inclusive and diverse workplace for all. Our diversity recruiting events target some of the most talented women working across tech - software engineers, UI/UX designers, data professionals, product folks, and beyond.
What to expect

Dynamic conversations, a level playing field for all attending companies, and an empowering atmosphere! Through our signature 5-minute speed rotations format, companies can engage with a diverse pool of talents and quickly identify potential hires who align with your team's vision.

It doesn't take much to prepare of one of our evenings. Half of the effort is just showing up, having those conversations, and making those connections. We also provide the full list of event attendees for followups after the evening.

Tl;dr

- Meet and engage with the local talent community

- Engaging and fun 5 minute speed format

- Get the full candidates list for follow ups

- Flat participation fee, no hiring fees/commissions

Bring diversity, equality, and inclusiveness into tech

Our evenings are designed to foster connections and facilitate meaningful conversations in our signature 5-minute speed rotations format. We kick off on the Welcome Stage with sponsor keynotes, followed by speed interviews, and we close each session with a happy hour (Open Networking) giving you the opportunity to connect with more candidates.

Whether you're actively seeking your next extraordinary hire, or just looking position your employer brand within the talent community, everyone wins at our events!

Why attend?
Connect directly with quality talent and start the hiring relationship early
Showcase your brand, technologies, and projects to a diverse audience of tech professionals and innovators
Highlight your company’s support and commitment to diversity and inclusion
Get in front of handpicked talents and hire women who are amazing at their jobs

We invite you to join us in working towards the vision of equalizing the playing field in the tech industry while building mutually benefitting from an inclusive team.

-----

www.womenhack.com

Questions? Email us at fiona@womenhack.com

Refund Policy

title: Future Defence Conclave 2026
location:
New Delhi, India
New Delhi, India
New Delhi, India New Delhi, New Delhi 110001
start_datetime: Aug 11 at 8:30am to Aug 12 at 5:30pm GMT+5:30
description:
Theme: Future Warfare: AI, Next-Gen Technologies & Multi-Domain Readiness for Emerging Threats

The FutureDefence 2026 is an international gathering dedicated to exploring the frontiers of aerospace, artificial intelligence, cyber capabilities, and next-generation military systems. Scheduled for August 11–12,2026 in New Delhi, India, the Conclave will serve as a high-level platform where government leaders, armed forces, industry innovators, startups, academics, and investors come together to shape the future of defence and security.

This world-class event is designed to address the rapid technological, strategic, and geopolitical shifts redefining modern warfare. Through a blend of keynote speeches, strategic panels, innovation showcases, and closed-door leadership forums, the Conclave
provides unparalleled opportunities for knowledge exchange, policy influence, and global collaboration. Delegates will explore critical areas such as autonomous systems, space security, cyber resilience, hypersonics, joint all-domain operations, and the rise of AI-enabled decision-making on the battlefield.

India’s growing role in defence modernization, supported by Atmanirbhar Bharat (self-reliance initiatives), makes New Delhi a strategic host city for this landmark event. Positioned at the crossroads of the Indo-Pacific, the Conclave creates a unique

title: Advancing Resilient and Efficient AI Models for a Sustainable Future
location:
Bharat Mandapam
Pragati Maidan
New Delhi, DL 110001
description:
At the AI Impact Summit, learn from the best minds about strategies and research for more resilient, leaner, and more sustainable AI models

The event is an official event of the AI Impact Summit curated by the French Government, UNESCO and the Sustainable AI Coalition.

The speakers, through high-level keynotes and a panel, will examine how resilient and resource-efficient AI models can deliver high impact while reducing energy use, cost, and infrastructure dependence. The discussion will explore lightweight architectures, model optimization techniques, and deployment strategies suited to energy- and resource-constrained environments. It will highlight how efficient AI can expand access, support sustainability goals, and enable innovation across regions, while advancing a shared commitment to inclusive and environmentally responsible AI systems.

title: Tools, Skills, & Culture: Unpack Global Trends in Public Sector AI Adoption
location:
Shakuntalam Banquet, Sushma Swaraj Bhawan
15D, Dr. Jose P. Rizal Marg
New Delhi, DL 110021
description:
Join us in a discusion at the India AI Impact Summit surrounding the Global AI Adoption Index.

AI is reshaping how the public sector operates, with public servants in many countries already using AI tools in their day-to-day work. But the depth, quality, and consistency of adoption vary sharply across public institutions, raising a central question: why does AI become part of everyday practice in some public sectors, while remaining fragmented or experimental in others?

Drawing on new global research by ITIF’s Center for Data Innovation and Public First surveying over 3,000 public servants across ten countries, this session will surface how AI adoption is actually experienced on the ground inside public institutions. It will break adoption down into its core components, including access to tools, skills and training, leadership signals, and institutional culture, and show how these factors combine differently across jurisdictions.

Taking place as part of the India AI Impact Summit 2026, this discussion will connect these insights to the Summit’s broader focus on scaling real-world AI impact. It will explore how policymakers can strengthen public sector AI adoption in practice and translate AI ambition into sustained improvements in public services.

Date and Time:

February 17, 2026 from 2:30 PM to 3:25 PM (IST)

Speakers:

Karan Bhatia, Global Head of Government Affairs, Google
Daniel Castro, Director, ITIF’s Center for Data Innovation (Moderator)
Kazim Rizvi, Founding Director, The Dialogue
Rachel Wolf, CEO, Public First

Agenda:

2:30–2:35 PM - Welcome and Scene-Setting
2:35–2:45 PM - Research Overview: Global AI Adoption Index – Early Insights
2:45–3:05 PM - Panelist Perspectives
3:05–3:20 PM - Audience Interaction and Discussion
3:20–3:25 PM - Closing Reflections

All attendees must also be registered for the India AI Impact Summit 2026.

title: Bharat Shiksha Expo 2026
location:
India Expo Centre & Mart
Plot No. 23-25 & 27-29, Knowledge Park 2, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, 201306
Greater Noida, UP 201306
description:
Explore the future of education at Bharat Shiksha Expo 2026 -uniting students, educators, and institutions for innovation and career growth.
Welcome to the Bharat Shiksha Expo 2026!

Event Date: April 23- 25, 2026 at 10:00 AM

Bharat Shiksha Expo is not just an event; it is a nationwide movement transforming India’s education landscape through innovation and collaboration. This 3rd edition unites global education leaders, policymakers, EdTech innovators, institutions, and investors to shape the future of learning.Come join us at the India Expo Centre & Mart and explore a wide range of educational opportunities, connect with experts in various fields, and get insights into the latest trends in education.

Aligned with India’s National Education Policy 2020 (NEP 2020), the expo accelerates outcomes by showcasing cutting-edge solutions across the entire learning lifecycle from K-12 to higher education, vocational training to international admissions, and digital innovation to skill development. It champions equitable access, sustainability, and digital literacy on a national scale.

Key Highlights

- Over 150,000+ targeted visitors, including students, educators, institutional decision-makers, and government officials

- 200+ exhibitors across education segments such as universities, EdTech startups, coaching centers, career advisory, foreign universities, and more

- High-impact conferences, networking sessions, hands-on labs for AI, coding, creativity, and career guidance for youth

- Supported by the Higher Education Department, Govt. of Uttar Pradesh, and Greater Noida Industrial Development Authority

Why Participate?

- Connect directly with key decision-makers and stakeholders in India’s fastest-growing education ecosystem

- Gain far-reaching brand visibility through onsite, online, and media channels

- Engage with academic, government, and industry leaders driving educational transformation

- Experience a platform fostering collaboration to build a future-ready, innovation-led education ecosystem

Join Bharat Shiksha Expo 2026 to be part of India’s education uprising—Inspiring Learning, Shaping Tomorrow.

title: From Data Chaos to Clarity with Microsoft Fabric
location:
Teerth Technospace Building
C207 Highway
Pune, MH 411045
description:
Join us as we navigate the chaos of data to find clarity with Microsoft Fabric - it's time to streamline and simplify!

Join us in Pune for F3 – Fabric, Faluda & Fun, a hands-on, in-person workshop designed for engineers and data practitioners exploring modern analytics and AI platforms. Discover how Microsoft Fabric helps unify your data estate, simplify architecture, and accelerate real-world outcomes.

Led by Ankit Gondle, this session focuses on practical lessons from production environments: what works, what doesn’t, and what teams often underestimate when building Fabric-first platforms.

Expect meaningful conversations, shared learning, and the chance to connect with fellow engineers shaping the future of data. Plus, enjoy complimentary evening bites and drinks as the discussions continue.

What you’ll gain:

Real-world insights into Microsoft Fabric
Practical guidance for modern data platforms
Honest engineering conversations
Networking with the local data community

title: SNIA India T/E/N Storage Meetup - February 2026 - Hosted by Nutanix
location:
Nutanix Technologies India Pvt Ltd
Marathahalli - Sarjapur Outer Ring Road
#9th Bengaluru, KA 560103
description:
PLEASE NOTE: This is a SNIA event being generously hosted by a SNIA member, in this instance, Nutanix Technologies

PLEASE NOTE: This is a SNIA event being generously hosted by a SNIA member, in this instance Nutanix Technologies.

Talk on "Application‑Aware Data Policy Enforcement for VM‑Based Workloads" by Kanika Singhal, Senior Member of Technical Staff, R&D Flow team, Nutanix Technologies

Brief: Modern enterprise deployments still rely heavily on virtual machines for running storage‑adjacent and data‑intensive workloads, yet access control and data governance between such workloads is commonly limited to Layer‑3 and Layer‑4 mechanisms.

This talk presents a practical proof‑of‑concept that uses a Layer7 Proxy for policy enforcement point between virtual machines, enabling application‑aware control over data movement without modifying application or storage code. By inspecting protocol semantics such as TLS SNI, HTTP authority, and request paths, it enforces fine‑grained policies for storage endpoint access, data exfiltration prevention, and workload‑specific governance. The results demonstrate that Layer‑7 policy enforcement at the VM boundary provides stronger data security and observability guarantees than traditional network‑level controls, while remaining portable and reproducible across VM‑based environments.




Talk on "Nutanix Cloud-Native Storage with Acropolis OS: Enabling Stateful Kubernetes applications with Advanced Data Management" by Nilesh Joshi, Nutanix Technologies

Brief: Running stateful applications in Kubernetes requires storage that can scale and move as quickly as containers do. This session introduces CNAOS (Cloud Native AOS), a storage platform built specifically for containerized workloads.We will walk through the architecture of the CNAOS data plane and discuss how it operates across different platforms, including on-premises bare metal and public cloud. We will also cover how CNAOS integrates with the Nutanix CSI and Nutanix Data Services for Kubernetes (NDK) to provide application-aware snapshots and disaster recovery.




SNIA Talk on "ABC" by XYZ, Technologies

Brief:




Meetup Agenda:

10:00AM: Registration & Refreshments

10:30AM: Meetup Commences with a Welcome & Opening Remarks

10:45AM: Brief introduction about SNIA India

11:00AM: Talk on 'Application‑Aware Data Policy Enforcement for VM‑Based Workloads" by Kanika Singhal, Senior Member of Technical Staff, R&D Flow team, Nutanix Technologies

11:30AM: Talk on 'Nutanix Cloud-Native Storage with Acropolis OS: Enabling Stateful Kubernetes applications with Advanced Data Management" by Nilesh Joshi, Nutanix Technologies

12:00PM: SNIA Talk on 'ABC' by XYZ, Distinguished Engineer, Technologies

12.45PM: Networking Lunch




Speakers:

Kanika Singhal, Senior Member of Technical Staff, R&D Flow team is a Technical leader in Flow network security at Nutanix. 15 years of industry experience in the network and security domain. Prior to Nutanix was working in VMWare in SDWAN team

Nilesh Joshi is a Sr. Technical Manager has been a core member of the Cloud-Native AOS team since the very beginning. He is currently leading the engineering efforts behind Nutanix’s cloud-native storage.
embed_text: SNIA India T/E/N Storage Meetup - February 2026 - Hosted by Nutanix PLEASE NOTE: This is a SNIA event being generously hosted by a SNIA member, in this instance, Nutanix Technologies PLEASE NOTE: This is a SNIA event being generously hosted by a SNIA member, in this instance Nutanix Technologies. Talk on "Application‑Aware Data Policy Enforcement for VM‑Based Workloads" by Kanika Singhal, Senior Member of Technical Staff, R&D Flow team, Nutanix Technologies Brief: Modern enterprise deployments still rely heavily on virtual machines for running storage‑adjacent and data‑intensive workloads, yet access control and data governance between such workloads is commonly limited to Layer‑3 and Layer‑4 mechanisms. This talk presents a practical proof‑of‑concept that uses a Layer7 Proxy for policy enforcement point between virtual machines, enabling application‑aware control over data movement without modifying application or storage code. By inspecting protocol semantics such as TLS SNI, HTTP authority, and request paths, it enforces fine‑grained policies for storage endpoint access, data exfiltration prevention, and workload‑specific governance. The results demonstrate that Layer‑7 policy enforcement at the VM boundary provides stronger data security and observability guarantees than traditional network‑level controls, while remaining portable and reproducible across VM‑based environments. Talk on "Nutanix Cloud-Native Storage with Acropolis OS: Enabling Stateful Kubernetes applications with Advanced Data Management" by Nilesh Joshi, Nutanix Technologies Brief: Running stateful applications in Kubernetes requires storage that can scale and move as quickly as containers do. This session introduces CNAOS (Cloud Native AOS), a storage platform built specifically for containerized workloads.We will walk through the architecture of the CNAOS data plane and discuss how it operates across different platforms, including on-premises bare metal and public cloud. We will also cover how CNAOS integrates with the Nutanix CSI and Nutanix Data Services for Kubernetes (NDK) to provide application-aware snapshots and disaster recovery. Last year, in 2022, we came across a puzzle…

“How founders can meet Investors”?,

- Emails, cold calls & sharing pitch decks were not working. Investment consultants were seriously expensive. While some brokers only deal when deal size was more than $5M.

What about the rest? What about us? And then we came up with a plan.

"Investors Dinner" – Focused Networking Events for Connecting Investors & Founders.

Happy to share; in Nov 2023, it was a year on the mission. In the last 12 events, 1000+ Founders, 300+ Investors & 30+ Business Advisors had participated. We are also happy to share that, on average, a founder had made 5-6 investor connections in each event.

title: Eldercare India Expo 2026
location:
IEML
25-29, Knowledge Park II
Greater Noida, UP 201310
description:
Eldercare India Expo is an exhibition focused on products and services for the eldercare.
Elder Care India Expo 2026 is a pioneering event committed to transforming senior care by bringing together innovative solutions, industry experts, and key stakeholders.

As India’s premier eldercare exhibition, the expo aims to enhance the quality of life for senior citizens by showcasing cutting-edge products, services, and policies that support aging with dignity and independence.

According to NITI Aayog’s report on India’s aging population, the number of senior citizens in the country is expected to rise to over 319 million by 2050, nearly double from today. This demographic shift presents a pressing need for advanced healthcare, financial security, and supportive infrastructure for the elderly. Elder Care India Expo 2026 addresses these critical needs by fostering collaborations among healthcare providers, technology developers, caregivers, financial planners, and policymakers to create a future where elderly individuals receive the best possible care and support. The urgency to address the multifaceted needs of our seniors has never been more pronounced. This burgeoning segment not only underscores the challenges ahead but also illuminates vast opportunities for innovation and growth within the eldercare sector.

title: Pharmac South - 11th Edition
location:
Chennai Trade Centre
Mount Poonamalle High Road
Chennai, TN 600089
start_datetime: Jun 4 at 10am to Jun 5 at 6pm GMT+5:30
description:
Pharmac South is Indias leading exhibition for the pharmaceutical & nutraceutical industry, showcasing innovation, growth and key business

Pharmac South is one of Indias most prominent exhibitions for the pharmaceutical and nutraceutical industry, bringing together manufacturers, suppliers, distributors and service providers under one platform. Hosted at the Chennai Trade Centre, the event showcases the latest advancements in pharma manufacturing, formulations, ingredients, lab equipment, packaging solutions and healthcare technologies. With its strong regional presence and industry focused approach, Pharmac South offers an ideal space for companies to explore new markets, build partnerships and strengthen their business footprint across South India. The exhibition also supports MSMEs with reimbursement benefits, enabling wider participation and growth within the sector.

BENEFITS?




Build direct connections with Investors & Founders.
Find other interesting businesses & network with them.




*** Both Investors & Founders believe meeting in-person is far more effective to discuss investment rather than sending emails, cold calls & knocking on doors.

==========

OUR STORY?

Last year, in 2022, we came across a puzzle…

“How founders can meet Investors”?,

- Emails, cold calls & sharing pitch decks were not working. Investment consultants were seriously expensive. While some brokers only deal when deal size was more than $5M.

What about the rest? What about us? And then we came up with a plan.

"Investors Dinner" – Focused Networking Events for Connecting Investors & Founders.

Happy to share; in Nov 2023, it was a year on the mission. In the last 12 events, 1000+ Founders, 300+ Investors & 30+ Business Advisors had participated. We are also happy to share that, on average, a founder had made 5-6 investor connections in each event.

Recently, we also launched the

the
"Investors Chat" – 30mins 1-1 gossip with Investors to take investors opinion. And it is liked by many founders too.

We thank all investors, founders, partners & sponsors for making it work.

We are on a mission to make “Meeting Investors” easier & more effective.

Wish you luck!
Tablon




PS: According to feedback from many founders, Tablon stands out as the premier platform for connecting with investors in the UAE.

Wish luck to all!

Tablon

QUESTIONS?

Anushtha

title: Times Future of Maternity
location:
Delhi
New Delhi
New Delhi, DL 110001
description:
Dive into the future of maternity care with experts, tech, and real stories—all happening live!

Times Future of Maternity
Times Future of Maternity (TFM) 2026 | New Delhi | 28 March 2026




An initiative by Times Internet in association with Pregatips

Pregnancy and early parenthood are among life’s most powerful transitions, yet they often come with information overload, myths, anxiety, and uneven access to trusted care. At the same time, India’s maternity ecosystem is evolving fast: clinical excellence, fertility science, neonatology, mental health, nutrition, technology, community support, and policy must work together to improve outcomes for mothers and babies.

Times Future of Maternity (TFM) 2026 is a flagship platform that brings healthcare leaders and parent communities on one stage, built on trust, science, and collaboration.


What is TFM?

A high-impact, one-day convergence of the maternity ecosystem featuring:

• Summit: Keynotes + panels on the future of maternal & newborn care

• Expo / Experience Zone: Innovations, services, and solutions shaping maternity care

• Awards: Celebrating excellence, innovation, and impact across the ecosystem




Who should attend?

TFM is designed for:

• OB-GYNs, IVF specialists, fetal medicine experts

• Pediatricians, neonatologists, NICU teams

• Nurses, midwives, lactation consultants, physiotherapists

• Nutritionists, psychologists, counsellors, public health professionals

• Hospitals, clinics, diagnostics, health-tech & med-tech leaders

• Brand leaders in mother & baby care, insurance, wellness and allied services

• Expecting parents, new parents, caregivers, and community advocates




What you’ll take away

✅ Evidence-backed conversations that reduce confusion and improve decision-making

✅ Cross-specialty learning and collaboration to strengthen care pathways

✅ Insights into emerging trends: fertility, high-risk pregnancy, postpartum recovery, newborn care, mental health, and tech-enabled care

✅ Networking with clinicians, institutions, innovators, and parent communities

✅ A platform to celebrate leaders and initiatives improving maternal & newborn outcomes

Join us to co-create a future where every mother feels supported, every family has access to reliable information, and care pathways are more connected, from pre-conception to postpartum and early childhood.


Register / Learn more: https://pregatips.com/times-future-of-maternity-2026

(Seats are limited. Please register early.)


Note: Pregatips is an information platform and does not replace medical consultation. For emergencies, please seek immediate clinical care.


#TimesFutureOfMaternity #TFM2026 #MaternalHealth #NewbornHealth #OBGYN #Neonatology #IVF #FetalMedicine #PostpartumCare #Parenting #HealthcareInnovation #TimesInternet #Pregatips

Join the flagship industry gathering that brings together the world of surface treatment, finishing, coating and painting technologies under one roof.

This event unites two major segments:

Surface treatment & finishing: plating, anodising, blasting, polishing, anti-corrosion systems, vacuum/ion-plating.

Coating & painting: powders & liquids, raw materials, application systems, testing & monitoring equipment.

• Show-case your technology to thousands of decision-makers from automotive, electronics, furniture, construction, defence, energy and more.

• Launch new innovations, forge strategic partnerships, and stay ahead of trends in finishing & coatings.

Whether you are a student or a professional, a businessman or an entrepreneur applying the principles of the Shrimad Bhagavad Gita will help you overcome challenges and become successful in life.

title: 8th edition - EPCI in Oil & Gas Conference 2026
location:
The Orchid Hotel Mumbai Vile Parle
70-C Nehru Road
Mumbai, MH 400099
description:
EPCI (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) in Oil & Gas Conference

Following the success of EPC in Oil & Gas Conference 2025, key players in the oil and gas industry representing national and international oil companies, top EPC contractors and consultants are meeting again at 8th Annual EPC India 2026 in Mumbai, India.

Sustainability & innovation is the key to survival for any project. The EPC companies are experiencing business impacts, end-market diversification, change in contracting models, and digital transformation.

EPCI is an industry summit for thought leadership to discuss challenges and special risks and how to manage them. The attendees will take a note of changing national visions, business models, customer requirements, environmental concerns, sustainability and market drivers.

It is our continuous endeavour to reach out to the stake holders, Governments & the regulators to seek their support & invite them to our technical conferences. We would like to request your support to our events.

This year’s summit will provide a platform for the industry leaders to discuss digitalization, project management, contract management, capability building, trends and opportunities related to oil & gas, petrochemical & renewable energy projects, cost & risk reduction avenues for CAPEX.

What needs to be done:

EPC industry needs to integrate processes and products to ensure that better value can be delivered to the client.
Outsourcing of an activity for business process improvements such as reduced lead time, higher flexibility, reduced inventory etc.
Knowledge management and effective information flow for an effective value chain.
To manage capital projects efficiently, companies should develop a strategy or roadmap for capital project efficiency and performance improvement, which will help save on schedule, costs and lead to higher margins.
Design standardization provides one of the greatest savings opportunities in capital projects.
Digital technologies can make oil and gas capital projects more productive as well.




Visit us: https://www.epci.co.in

title: Leading Across Boundaries: The Power of Influence Beyond Title
location:
GoDaddy Office
The Pavilion Mall, 5th Floor
Senapati Bapat Rd, Laxmi Society, Model Colony, Shivajinagar Pune, MH 411016
description:
Join GoDaddy for Influence > Title. Women in Tech & Allies panel on leading across boundaries.

A Women in Tech & Allies Leadership Panel hosted by GoDaddy

Leadership today isn’t defined by hierarchy; it’s defined by influence.

In fast-moving, globally connected organizations, impact happens across functions, geographies, and perspectives. Success depends on building credibility, creating alignment, navigating resistance, and driving accountability, often without formal authority.




This special edition of Leading Across Boundaries is focused on elevating women in tech and the role of allies in strengthening leadership impact.




All are welcome.




Join us for a candid panel discussion featuring GoDaddy leaders:

Amrita Rai – Sr. Manager, Engineering
Suresh Gupta – Director of Engineering
Leena Jamdar – Sr. Technical Program Manager




Together, they’ll explore:

Building credibility in technical and cross-functional environments
Navigating resistance and bias
Practicing allyship in action
Driving alignment and accountability across teams
Turning influence into execution




This will be a practical, high-energy conversation grounded in real experience, not theory.




Whether you’re looking to strengthen your leadership capability or explore opportunities in an environment that values collaboration, experimentation, and global teamwork, this session offers insight into how we lead and grow.




📅 25 February
⏰ 5:00 PM–7:00 PM IST
📍 GoDaddy Pune (location listed above)

Influence isn’t about title.
It’s about impact.

Reserve your seat today.




In the meantime, check out our GoDaddy Life social pages! Follow us to meet our team, learn more about our culture, careers, locations, and so much more. Here at GoDaddy, we thrive on collaboration, embrace fluidity, and seek diversity, and we are looking for candidates who share the same values.

description:
Rankridge IIT JEE & NEET institute is one of the top NEET coaching institutes in Hyderabad, known for its student-first approach.
Best Coaching for NEET in Hyderabad – Your Gateway to a Medical Career

Introduction:

Cracking NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) is a dream for lakhs of students in India who aspire to become doctors. With limited government seats and fierce competition, securing a high rank in NEET is crucial. Hyderabad, being one of the major educational hubs in India, has emerged as a top destination for NEET aspirants. The city is home to several reputed coaching centres that offer quality training, experienced faculty, and the right academic environment. If you're searching for the best coaching for NEET in Hyderabad, this article will guide you with all the necessary insights.

Why Choose Hyderabad for NEET Coaching?

Hyderabad has gained immense popularity among students for NEET preparation due to its well-established educational infrastructure, experienced teachers, and consistent results. The city combines tradition with technology, offering a calm yet competitive environment for medical aspirants.

Key Features of the Best NEET Coaching in Hyderabad

Experienced Faculty: The best institutes hire highly qualified teachers from medical backgrounds or top IIT/NIT backgrounds, especially for Physics and Chemistry.

Comprehensive Study Material: Updated, NCERT-focused and competitive material makes a big difference in preparation.

Doubt Clearing Sessions: Special sessions are conducted regularly to address individual doubts and strengthen weak areas.

Mock Tests & Practice Papers: Frequent tests based on NEET patterns help in building confidence and improving time management.

Personal Mentoring: Many top coaching institutes offer one-on-one mentorship which helps track progress and keeps students motivated.

Online & Offline Support: With the rise of digital learning, institutes also offer hybrid coaching – blending classroom learning with digital modules.

Hostel & Library Facilities: Several coaching centres in Hyderabad provide integrated campuses with hostel, food and library services

How to Choose the Best Coaching Institute?

Attend Demo Classes: Before enrolling, attend demo sessions to understand teaching methods.
Check Past Results: Genuine success stories and NEET ranks from previous batches.
Reviews & Testimonials: Feedback from current students and parents can help a lot.
Batch Size: Opt for institutes with a reasonable teacher-student ratio.
Fee Structure: Understand the complete fee breakup, refund policy, and scholarship options.
Conclusion

If you are a serious NEET aspirant looking to secure a medical seat in a government college, investing in the best coaching for NEET in Hyderabad is a wise decision. The city offers everything a medical aspirant needs – from expert faculty to updated study material, stress management to peer learning.

+91 6301097594

description:
Secret to handling stress, anxiety, and depression and Increase your 100% Potential to Achieve your Goals in Life.

The Secret to Handling Stress & Anxiety

If you’ve ever felt there was something holding you back in life-ruining your plans and stopping you from being who you want to be… you were right.

The fact is there is a single source of all your stress anxiety and unhappiness.

It’s called the reactive mind—the hidden part of your mind that stores all painful experiences and then uses them against you.

In this Lecture, you will learn what and where this source is, and will show you how to handle it. Thus putting you in full control of your life—and this is the only thing in the world that actually accomplishes this.

To know more about this lecture, watch the video here.

The painful experiences of our past clearly have an effect on our present behavior. But to what degree? And why?

Revealing the exact and previously unknown source of people’s nightmares fears upsets and insecurities. It further provides a technology to free yourself from them and so achieve something Man has previously only dreamed of:

title: Delhi Social and Political Walk
location:
UNIQLO Connaught Place, Delhi
1-A Radial Road Number 2
#Building No. 1 New Delhi, DL 110001
description:
Join us for an interactive storytelling walk through the city that combines documentary-style analysis with exciting street exploration.

This interactive storytelling walk offers the immersive flow and depth of a documentary, guiding you through a detailed and thought-provoking exploration. You’ll uncover surprising insights as we analyze the forces that have shaped the nation.

The tour highlights the country's social and political landscape, tracing its evolution from the creation of the modern state to the present day. We’ll examine both historical and contemporary events with a balanced, unbiased perspective, allowing you to form your own informed understanding of this complex land.

Designed for those with a genuine interest in politics and anyone eager to learn more about the country through first-hand exploration, this experience encourages curiosity, reflection, and discovery.

Contact us at info@theplanetwonk.com to schedule a different date and time that suits you better.

https://getpaidx.com/r/26011DLGJ50000
and explain what AI discussion topics/projects you will be co-working/managing, and some sponsors companies will fund your ₹75 co-working day pass.

Easily accessible via a short walk from Bandra-Kurla Complex Metro Station (Asia’s largest).

Cost: FREE. But you must already be a customer of BHIVE, i.e. you must buy the ₹75 "Co-Working Day Pass" from BHIVE website online:
https://bhiveworkspace.com/book-day-and-bulk-day-pass/
The day pass includes high-speed Wi-Fi, unlimited coffee/tea, and screen access for the full day of Saturday—ideal if you want to arrive early to code.

🗓️ When & Where Every Saturday: 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM (Mumbai time zone).
Location (Google Map): BHIVE Platinum Plus BKC, 3rd floor, Unit No. 305, Inspire BKC Rd, G Block BKC, Bandra East (10 min walk from BKC Metro station (Aqua Line 3)). Bring your own laptop. Look for groups of 3-5 people co-working on various AI topics...

🌍 Global Context We share a direct link with the Dubai AI (DIFC) https://www.meetup.com/dubai-ai and Shanghai AI (Bookstore) https://www.meetup.com/shanghai-ai communities. Expect cross-border insights from the Gulf and China tech scenes as we transition this pilot into a dedicated Mumbai AI chapter.

---
Reply with a comment below or at https://getpaidx.com/r/26011DLGJ50000 to add ideas to this scratchpad of possible co-working projects, discussion topics, brainstorming and collaborations for next co-working sessions:
- how to get paid and funded by fans, clients, local businesses: co-working around app payments, Stripe API (US) vs WeChat Pay / Alipay (China) vs RazorPay API (India) vs PayU API (India) vs Cashfree, Justpay, marketplace payout, taxes, financial regulations, etc...
- how to get closer to creators, authors, developers: co-working around local WhatsApp communities, local co-working spaces, local business networks and entrepreneurs, government contracts, regulated industries education/healthcare/legal, what products do local customers want? etc...
- how to get published and share revenue with influencers, publishers, co-creators: co-working around partnering with local influencers with large Instagram/Facebook/Youtube audiences, how to promote, distribute, market the products, etc...
- how to save time by delegating your work efforts to AI agents: co-working around setup for AI coding agents in the terminal CLI for any and all tasks, OpenAI Codex CLI, Google Gemini CLI, Anthropic Claude Code, Google Antigravity, etc...

add your own ideas, discussion and co-working topics and projects...
